news.title:
J&K Bank plans to raise ₹750 crore via QIP by March 2026, despite West Asia conflict impacting risk appetite.
CEO projects 14-15% loan growth by FY27; shares rose 35% last year, ranking sixth in 5-year banking stock returns.
news.summary:
J&K Bank plans to raise ₹750 crore via QIP by March 2026, despite West Asia conflict impacting risk appetite.
CEO projects 14-15% loan growth by FY27; shares rose 35% last year, ranking sixth in 5-year banking stock returns.

news.title:
J&K Bank's Q4 update shows resilient growth in deposits and advances.
MD & CEO Amitabh Chatterjee discussed the bank's roadmap amid regulatory changes.
news.summary:
J&K Bank's Q4 update shows resilient growth in deposits and advances.
MD & CEO Amitabh Chatterjee discussed the bank's roadmap amid regulatory changes.

news.title:
J&K Bank's FY26 business grew 13.6% to ₹2.9 lakh crore, with advances up 16.8%.
CASA deposits rose 8.1% YoY to ₹75,478 crore; shares fell 0.8% to ₹113.36.
news.summary:
J&K Bank's FY26 business grew 13.6% to ₹2.9 lakh crore, with advances up 16.8%.
CASA deposits rose 8.1% YoY to ₹75,478 crore; shares fell 0.8% to ₹113.36.

news.title:
J&K Bank's gross advances rose to Rs 1.25T vs Rs 1.07T YoY.
Total deposits climbed to Rs 1.65T vs Rs 1.49T YoY.
news.summary:
J&K Bank's gross advances rose to Rs 1.25T vs Rs 1.07T YoY.
Total deposits climbed to Rs 1.65T vs Rs 1.49T YoY.

news.title:
Jammu & Kashmir Bank is a Scheduled Commercial Bank under RBI Act 1934.
SEBI's Chapter XII debt issuance regulations don't apply to the bank.
news.summary:
Jammu & Kashmir Bank is a Scheduled Commercial Bank under RBI Act 1934.
SEBI's Chapter XII debt issuance regulations don't apply to the bank.

news.title:
Jammu and Kashmir Bank states Chapter XII of SEBI circular is not applicable.
The bank informed NSE and BSE about non-applicability of debt issuance rules.
news.summary:
Jammu and Kashmir Bank states Chapter XII of SEBI circular is not applicable.
The bank informed NSE and BSE about non-applicability of debt issuance rules.

news.title:
Jammu & Kashmir Bank's valuation shifted from very attractive to attractive.
Market sentiment change tied to PE, PBV adjustments, and peer comparisons.
news.summary:
Jammu & Kashmir Bank's valuation shifted from very attractive to attractive.
Market sentiment change tied to PE, PBV adjustments, and peer comparisons.

news.title:
J&K Bank faces ₹200.2 cr GST demand, plus equal penalty, for Feb '20-Mar '24.
Bank disputes demand, citing lack of legal basis, and holds court stay on similar cases.
news.summary:
J&K Bank faces ₹200.2 cr GST demand, plus equal penalty, for Feb '20-Mar '24.
Bank disputes demand, citing lack of legal basis, and holds court stay on similar cases.

news.title:
Jammu & Kashmir Bank saw a 1.4% daily gain on 26 Feb 2026.
The stock delivered 11.3% returns over a 5-day rally, reflecting strong investor interest.
news.summary:
Jammu & Kashmir Bank saw a 1.4% daily gain on 26 Feb 2026.
The stock delivered 11.3% returns over a 5-day rally, reflecting strong investor interest.

news.title:
J&K Bank clarified no undisclosed price-sensitive info amid volume surge.
The bank stated all material info is disclosed; surge deemed market-driven.
news.summary:
J&K Bank clarified no undisclosed price-sensitive info amid volume surge.
The bank stated all material info is disclosed; surge deemed market-driven.

news.title:
PSBs surpass private banks as quarterly profits reach new highs.
Only 3 of 30 listed universal banks had >1% net NPAs in Q3.
news.summary:
PSBs surpass private banks as quarterly profits reach new highs.
Only 3 of 30 listed universal banks had >1% net NPAs in Q3.

news.title:
RBI's revised PSL norms push banks towards direct lending, reducing reliance on NBFCs. External audits aim to curb misclassification and double counting.
ICICI Bank, HDFC Bank, and Axis Bank faced provisions due to PSL gaps. Total PSL book exceeds Rs 65 lakh crore, with MSME loans at Rs 31.3 lakh crore in FY25.
news.summary:
RBI's revised PSL norms push banks towards direct lending, reducing reliance on NBFCs. External audits aim to curb misclassification and double counting.
ICICI Bank, HDFC Bank, and Axis Bank faced provisions due to PSL gaps. Total PSL book exceeds Rs 65 lakh crore, with MSME loans at Rs 31.3 lakh crore in FY25.

news.title:
Jammu & Kashmir Bank sees no immediate need for QIP despite board approval, citing steady credit growth and improved profits.
The bank reported a 10.7% YoY profit rise in Q3 FY25, with shares gaining over 8% in the past year.
news.summary:
Jammu & Kashmir Bank sees no immediate need for QIP despite board approval, citing steady credit growth and improved profits.
The bank reported a 10.7% YoY profit rise in Q3 FY25, with shares gaining over 8% in the past year.

news.title:
Jammu & Kashmir Bank raised Rs. 250-750 Cr per issue via QIPs and preferential issues from 2017-2023.
Funds were utilized as intended for growth and capital adequacy with no deviations up to Dec 2025.
news.summary:
Jammu & Kashmir Bank raised Rs. 250-750 Cr per issue via QIPs and preferential issues from 2017-2023.
Funds were utilized as intended for growth and capital adequacy with no deviations up to Dec 2025.

news.title:
J&K Bank's Q3, 9M FY25 assets at Rs 177,467 Cr, advances Rs 113,537 Cr.
Board approved results on Jan 20, 2026; Rs 228.7 Cr provision for investment impairment.
news.summary:
J&K Bank's Q3, 9M FY25 assets at Rs 177,467 Cr, advances Rs 113,537 Cr.
Board approved results on Jan 20, 2026; Rs 228.7 Cr provision for investment impairment.

news.title: Jammu & Kashmir Bank posted Q3 net profit of 5.9B INR, up from 5.3B INR YoY.
news.summary: Jammu & Kashmir Bank posted Q3 net profit of 5.9B INR, up from 5.3B INR YoY.

news.title:
Jammu & Kashmir Bank reported reviewed financial results for Q3 and nine months ending Dec 31, 2025, as per SEBI norms.
The board approved the results on Jan 20, 2026, highlighting key metrics and compliance with RBI and SEBI guidelines.
news.summary:
Jammu & Kashmir Bank reported reviewed financial results for Q3 and nine months ending Dec 31, 2025, as per SEBI norms.
The board approved the results on Jan 20, 2026, highlighting key metrics and compliance with RBI and SEBI guidelines.

news.title:
Major Indian banks like HDFC, Yes Bank, and ICICI are set to announce Q3FY26 results, with key dates spanning January 13-31.
Stock performances varied; CSB Bank gained 29%, while HDFC Bank fell 5% over the past month. Provisional updates highlight mixed growth.
news.summary:
Major Indian banks like HDFC, Yes Bank, and ICICI are set to announce Q3FY26 results, with key dates spanning January 13-31.
Stock performances varied; CSB Bank gained 29%, while HDFC Bank fell 5% over the past month. Provisional updates highlight mixed growth.

news.title:
FIIs raised stakes in Canara Bank, J&K Bank, Torrent Pharma, and SJVN in Q3FY26, reflecting confidence in long-term growth and asset quality improvement.
Canara Bank saw the highest FII increase of 2.7%, while SJVN had the lowest at 0.1%. FIIs' decisions influence market liquidity and sentiment.
news.summary:
FIIs raised stakes in Canara Bank, J&K Bank, Torrent Pharma, and SJVN in Q3FY26, reflecting confidence in long-term growth and asset quality improvement.
Canara Bank saw the highest FII increase of 2.7%, while SJVN had the lowest at 0.1%. FIIs' decisions influence market liquidity and sentiment.
